arts.sum: How to watch Brighton vs Aston Villa - Live stream and TV channel for Premier League clash Aston Villa will aim to give their chances of playing European football again next season a huge boost when they travel to Brighton & Hove Albion in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to offer Boubacar Kamara ‘historic’ contract to ward off suitors
arts.sum: Aston Villa are desperate to retain Boubacar Kamara (25) to the extent that the Premier League side are willing to offer the Frenchman a “historic” new contract. As revealed by The Telegraph last week,…

arts.ttl: Fundraiser set up to help record-breaking former Aston Villa captain
arts.sum: A fundraiser has been set up to raise money to keep a former Aston Villa captain from spending the rest of his life confined to a wheelchair. "Jimmy lived in Birmingham for a big chunk of his post-playing career before moving out to Spain seven years ago," A JustGiving page set up to help the former Villa captain explained.
